pi_items.source: Confirmed from setup_task.sh which creates the environment at this path.
Confirmed from setup_task.sh and test files which inject and test for exactly these three bugs.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a fully synthetic subtitle processor application generated at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/subtitle_processor. The environment injects three specific bugs: a timestamp rollover bug in timestamp.py, a framerate conversion ratio bug in converter.py, and an EOF parsing bug in parser.py. The verifier awards up to 100 points based on the fix of these three bugs and requires a minimum threshold of 60 points to pass.
